title: Deduplicate POST Requests with Idempotency Keys in FastAPI
summary: Deduplicate one FastAPI POST endpoint with an Idempotency-Key header and a single-process in-memory store.
verification_setup: Install fastapi, uvicorn, and httpx in the active Python environment.
verification_notes: Validated with Python 3.9.6 on macOS using unittest and FastAPI TestClient. Verified behavior covers requiring Idempotency-Key on POST, replaying successful responses, separating different keys, returning 409 while work is in progress, not caching failed responses, bypassing non-POST requests, separating user scopes, and normalizing authorization scope.
